ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "delivery_person_id" TEXT /* Reference to the delivery person assigned to the order */,
  "restaurant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the restaurant from which the order originated */,
  "restaurant_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the restaurant location */,
  "restaurant_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the restaurant location */,
  "delivery_location_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the delivery location */,
  "delivery_location_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the delivery location */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "time_ordered" TEXT /* Time the order was placed */,
  "time_order_picked" TEXT /* Time the order was picked up from the restaurant */,
  "time_delivered" TEXT /* Time the order was delivered */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the order */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the delivery */,
  "road_traffic_density" TEXT /* Road traffic density during the delivery */,
  "vehicle_condition" INTEGER /* Condition of the delivery vehicle */,
  "type_of_order" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., Snack, Drinks, Buffet) */,
  "type_of_vehicle" TEXT /* Type of delivery vehicle used */,
  "multiple_deliveries" INTEGER /* Indicates if there are multiple deliveries in a single trip */,
  "festival" TEXT /* Indicates if the delivery occurred during a festival */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the delivery took place */,
  "time_taken_min" INTEGER /* Time taken to complete the delivery in minutes */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., received, in_progress, completed, cancelled) */,
  "delivery_fee" REAL /* Delivery fee associated with the order */,
  "customer_feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback on the delivery experience */,
  "customer_rating" REAL /* Customer rating for the delivery experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_weather_conditions FOREIGN KEY ("weather_conditions") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_road_traffic_density FOREIGN KEY ("road_traffic_density") REFERENCES road_traffic ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_type_of_order FOREIGN KEY ("type_of_order") REFERENCES order_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_vehicle_condition FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_condition") REFERENCES vehicle_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_delivery_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_person_id") REFERENCES delivery_persons ("delivery_person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_persons" (
  "delivery_person_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each delivery person */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the delivery person */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the delivery person */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the delivery person */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Ratings received by the delivery person */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the delivery person (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "vehicle_registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle used by the delivery person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the restaurant */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the restaurant location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the restaurant location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served by the restaurant (e.g., Indian, Chinese, Italian) */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Ratings received by the restaurant */,
  "reviews" TEXT /* Reviews of the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_conditions" (
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Condition of the vehicle (e.g., 1 - Poor, 2 - Average, 3 - Good) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* Maintenance history of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition (e.g., Sunny, Stormy, Cloudy) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the delivery */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the delivery */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the delivery */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road traffic condition */,
  "traffic_description" TEXT /* Description of the road traffic condition (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "congestion_level" TEXT /* Congestion level of the road traffic (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "road_closures" TEXT /* Road closures or construction affecting the delivery route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order type */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., Snack, Drinks, Buffet) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle used for delivery (e.g., motorcycle, scooter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order type */,
  "price" REAL /* Price associated with the order type */,
  "additional_fees" REAL /* Additional fees associated with the order type */,
  "promotions" TEXT /* Promotions or discounts offered with the order type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery zone */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Description of the delivery zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)
